dialog: Ani, was Robert at the club yesterday?
And did he ask for a dance?
And did you give him one?
Dude, the DJ is a fuckin’ asshole. I swear to god.
He’s Jimmy’s cousin. That’s the only reason he has this gig.
Fucking attitude on this guy. I gave him my playlist and he said maybe. Fucking maybe.
And how old is he? Like 40? Shit.
Got a kid that wants someone who knows Russian.
Your cousin better show some respect around here or he ain’t getting shit from the girls.
I’m so deadass right now, Jimmy.
Seriously, what? What do you want me to do?
He gave me attitude when I gave him my playlist.
That’s it? Attitude? I’m so sorry your feelings are hurt but I don’t really give a care. Alright?
I’m dealing with a lot of straight up BS tonight. Let’s go.
That’s why you have tupperware, to keep things fresh. C’mon.
Who? Katya? She’s been gone for three months.
Gentlemen, please meet Ani. She’ll take care of you tonight. Let me know if you need anything.
Ivan. Sit down, sit down. You’re a beautiful girl.
I don’t speak Russian but I know Russian.
I can speak Russian but I’d just prefer not to. But you go ahead, speak Russian. I can understand.
Ok, hello Ivan. I’m Ani. This is how I speak Russian. Do you still want me to speak Russian?
Well thank you but I disagree.
So how do you know Russian then?
My grandmother never learned English so... But enough about me. You two from Russia?
Yes. I guess you could say that. I’m speaking Russian, ok?
Ok. Because I probably sound terrible in English.
You need a drink so we can cheers to our bad accents.
Want to bring it to VIP?
Ok, can you sit on your hands for me?
And you gotta keep them there ok? This is a no-no. But I like you.
Do you work outside the club?
Do you see milk in the fridge?
Then I didn’t pick up the fucking milk.
Hello. I’m here for Mr. Zakharov.
Water? You sure? You can have anything you want. Vodka? Tequila? Coca-Cola?
Ok, suit yourself. Sparkling or flat?
Oh... beautiful. Your home is beautiful.
Excuse the mess. They haven't fixed my bed yet... Is it so difficult?
Ok. So what are you looking for?
Yeah, I know. I mean... anything special?
Special sex. So... a little bit of everything.
Want to take your clothes off?
Do you want to put this on or do you want me to put in on for you?
Wait, I need to do it right now.
I don’t know, you’re just funny.
Yeah, funny cool. So what do you do to... get all this?
What do you think I do?
What do you think I think you do?
You made some app or something?
I do have some cool ideas for apps but no.
Nikolai Zakharov. Z. A. K. H...
Yeah, see there. Children. Ivan Zakharov. That’s me.
Yeah. And... seeing him again tomorrow.
You’re makin’ it our business. Chatty bitch.
Ok, which one of you decided to bedazzle my clipboard?
Whoever did this owes me a new clipboard.
That was crazy good. You’re the best.
Hey, you should come to my New Year’s party. It’s going to be bangin’.
I might have to work that night.
You might not have to work that night.
Not if it’s a guy. I don’t want a sausage party.
So you paid for an hour and there’s still like 45 minutes if you want to go again.
Oh shit. Can you adjust my tits? I think my tits are off.
Hey... New York’s hottest girl is here!
Hey! I know you! Happy New Year!
That’s the escort Ivan is fucking.
Whoa, whoa, whoa. I’m a taken man already.
Thank you. You were right. This is bangin’.
Oh shit! It’s almost midnight! It’s almost midnight.
Hey, this is not a jungle gym, get off of there.
Whatever. I’m busy, man. The fuck.
No, no dude, it’s 5 o’clock... PM.
Oh good afternoon. Well, come back. C’mon. Don’t go yet.
Dude, I work tonight. I got shit to do.
Here, come back. Please. Just a minute.
So... I want you to be exclusive with me. For the week. And we can have... fun.
I don’t know... only with me.
Hang with me and my boys for the week. We can have fun. Party. Like... be my girlfriend for the week.
My horny girlfriend for the week.
Oh... of course... how about 10K for the week?
You know, I would have done it for 10.
He’s not going to be happy. I’m telling you right now. He’s not going to happy.
Tell him. Cause I don’t want to.
What’s going on is she wants a week off. That’s what’s going on.
I thought you wanted me to tell him.
You see what I deal with. I had the schedule done... already distributed. And she pulls this last minute.
What? We just gave you New Year’s.
Jesus Christ Jimmy. When I’m getting health insurance, worker’s comp and a fucking 401k, you can tell me when I work and not work.
Thank you Ani! Love you! Thank you very much.
Um, I don’t know what you’re talking about, but anyway I’m not taking any more shifts this week.
Thank you Ani! Love you! Thank you very much.
Correct. And I’ll be back next Tuesday.
Yeah but I been here since I was three.
That’s cool. Yeah, I’m Russian... but I was born here. Sucks.
Tom? No! He’s my cousin. Hey... Ani thought Tom and I are dating.
The last time Klara smoked, my mom caught her doing a cryo session.
Wait, you have a cryo chamber?
Yeah, my mom thinks it makes her younger. Want to try?
I got the keys confiscated because I brought the Porsche to a take- over and fucked up the bumper. My parents are assholes.
The best K I’ve ever had was in Vegas.
Great idea. Let’s go to Vegas right now!
Welcome back to Caesars Palace, Mr. Zakharov. Your suite is just about ready. We didn’t know you were coming and the suite was occupied but they’re out and housekeeping should be done any minute.
What the fuck, man. You mean I have to wait...
I’m fucking with you, man! No problem. We’ll be on the floor! It’s great to be back!
I bet they’re going to have make-up sex.
And it’s going to be crazy.
You know... I only fuck FOB’s.
Oh yeah? How many FOB’s have you fucked?
I mean... well my ex was a FOB and he’s the only guy I’ve ever fucked... but you know, I plan to only fuck FOB’s moving forward.
Ok, hold on. You know... it could last longer and be better if you take it easy. Here... just let me.
I hope you had fun this week.
I hope you had fun this week.
I did. We should do it again sometime.
I leave to go back to Russia at the end of the month. I promised my dad that I’d start working for his company.
Oh... it all makes sense now.
I’m gonna miss you. Does that sound weird?
You’ll miss me or my money?
If I got married to an American, I would never have to go back.
I don’t know... Crystal? Your friend Lulu? She’s hot.
It is Vegas. Don’t people get married in Vegas?
Ok, well then go get married.
Don’t tease me with that shit. That ain’t cool.
You want to marry... you want to get married?
Because I like what we have going on here and I think you do too... I think you’d like it even if you weren’t paid to. And I become American! And my parents can go screw!
Yes, I’m serious. I said I’m serious.
I’d look terrible if you had anything under four.
Oh my god. You’re so lucky.
She hit the Lotto, PowerBall and Mega Millions, bitch.
I’ll come back and visit you guys. Get myself a private or two.
So this is for real? Because if so, I got to stop letting high rollers in. They’re stealing my girls.
I give it two weeks, bitch.
He married you for a green card.
Whatever. It’s not about a green card. He could easily buy citizenship.
But you’re getting him a green card.
It’s not about the green card. He likes living here in America... with me.
How well do you know him?
How well do I know him... did you hear what I said? Try to keep up. His dad is loaded... Nikolai Zakharov. Fucking Google him. He’s worth 22... billion. BILLLLLIIOOOONNNN.
Don’t worry. I’ll keep paying the rent. Understand? Ok? Ok. Bye.
No, let me assure you, this is impossible. These are just rumors. I was with him on New Year’s Eve, he isn’t married.

No, no, no disrespect. Of course. Ok. But it can’t be true. No, I’m at... I’m not there right now but I’m headed there. I will let you know ASAP. You’ll hear from me in 30 minutes max. Yes, understood. Ok. Bye.
Garnik, I need you now. Come.
I need you to grab the Russian and get over to the house NOW!
Come on. Just answer or shut it off.
What did they say when you told them?
I don’t want to talk about them.
I mean... This is good news. Right? Parents usually want their kids to get married.
Yeah, but my parents are dicks. And whatever.
Well, no matter what. I hope they like me... You know... Like, when we meet.
When will I meet your family?
Well, if you want to go to Miami... my mom lives there with her man. and you can meet my sister anytime although I’m sure she’ll try to steal you... she’s loves Russian guys.
Hey. I’m tryin’ here. Asshole. Ok, English from now on for me.
Your Russian is wonderful! It’s great.
Komsomolskaya Pravda ran a photo of him and some girl at a basketball game. And they are saying she’s a prostitute.
It’s not funny, man. Don’t laugh. If it’s true, Toros and I are fucked. Well, I’m not as fucked as Toros but still.
Probably. But look... if things get crazy, don’t get rough with Ivan. Actually, don’t even touch Ivan. Let me deal with him.
What do you need me for then?
In case his boys are here... and they want to play games.
He hasn’t left while I’ve been here but my shift just started.
Do you know if he got married?
I just started my shift. I don’t know...
Please Ivan, we have to talk.
Hey! You can’t just enter my home.
Fuck you, Garnik. I don’t have to listen to you.
That hurts my foot. Please stop that.
Well, not me. Your father sent Toros and Toros sent us.
He’s busy and he’s very upset with you... if this is true.
Did you get married to some prostitute?
So you and her are married?
You’re in a lot of trouble.
Wait. Wait. I need to see the marriage license.
Now c’mon the faster we do it, the faster we’re out of here.
You’ve got to be kidding me. My parents are fucking crazy! Pathetic. Ok, they want proof. We give them proof.
It’s in the desk. In the office. What’s going on?
Nothing. My parents are just being assholes.
What are you doing here, that’s what I’m asking.
I’ve been asked to take a photo of the license.
My parents asked for a photo?
Oh my god. You people are pathetic.
Time to say goodbye. My wife and I would like some privacy, thank you. And tell Toros to go fuck himself.
I need to see what Toros says.
What? C’mon. Enough is enough. Out.
Standby? What the fuck does that mean?
He wrote, ‘stand by’. So we stand by.
Ivan, with all due respect... your father sent us over.
Hello sir. Hello ma'am. So yes, apparently it is true.
Hey... you guys work for Ivan’s family... so I’m thinking that means you work for him. He told you to take it outside. Now, take it outside.
Oh, I can't. I’m not with him. I’m actually not there. Garnik is. But I’m going over there right now to fix this. It will be fixed. Do not worry.
Oh no. That’s not necessary. Really. You don’t have to... I can handle this. Ok, ok. Got it. Yes sir. And yes, ma'am.
Get out now or I’ll have my father fire your fucking ass!
I’m so sorry I must go. There’s an emergency.
Put me on speaker so the hooker can hear as well!
What the fuck! I’m not a fuckin’ hooker!
She’s not a hooker, she’s an erotic dancer!
I don’t check in on you in two weeks and you marry a whore?!?
I’m not a fucking whore you fucking Russian piece of shit.
Well guess what? You really did it this time. Ready? Ready? YOUR PARENTS ARE ON THEIR WAY!
Yes. Like a school boy, you’re being picked up by your parents because you were naughty. We’re meeting them tomorrow at noon.
And taking your ass back to St. Petersburg, so start packing.
We’re married, baby. They have to accept that.
Accept that? That’s funny. Ok. Ivan, I’ll be there in ten minutes and you and the streetwalker are coming with me...
...down to city hall where we’re getting this marriage annulled.
We are going down to city hall where this fake marriage will be annulled. Canceled. So be ready to go by the time I get there. And missy... you’re out of that house TONIGHT!
I’m not going anywhere you, fucking piece of shit.
We’re not getting divorced because you tell us to. Go fuck yourself! Right Ivan?
Yes, you little shit. They are leaving Russia now.
Well, I’m out of here so fuck you.
The fuck I can’t. Let’s go!
Going where? What? What’s going on?
Wait. Did he say he was leaving? No! Don’t let him leave.
Ivan, why do we have to leave our house?
Let’s go, let’s go, let’s go.
Let me get dressed. Ivan, what’s happening?
Ivan! Wait! Are you fucking kidding me?
Did he say bye? NOOOO! Get him! What’s happening!
Are you killing her? What’s happening? Stop it!
Ivan having one of his tantrums?
She’s crazy. Come and help me please!
What did you do to her?
You want me to keep her from going or what?
She’s out of fucking control. Look!
I need your help. Grab that cord and tie her legs.
You two are fucking dead for this. I’m Ivan’s fucking wife.
Good. I’m glad I broke your fucking nose.
You two are fucking dead for this. I’m Ivan’s fucking wife!
I’m not fighting you. I’m not going to run. You’re fucking hurting me. Let me go.
I will make sure you go away for this. Look, there are cameras everywhere. You’re so fucked.
Just wait until Ivan sees what you did to me.
The Ivan that just left you?
He didn’t leave me. He went for help.
Toros, we have a situation here man.
She broke my fucking nose, man. You broke my nose you fucking bitch!
Fucking piece of shit. I bet you like this, don’t you. You getting off on this? Psycho fuck.
I don’t like this. I’m not being paid enough for this.
I can feel you getting hard motherfucker.
Oh my God. Oh my god. What? What is happening? Who did this?
Hey! You the fuck on the phone?!?
What the happened? What the fuck happened?
Yo! Boss man! I’m talking to you! What’s happening? Tell this fuck to let me go!
Did you touch Ivan? Where’s Ivan?
No, Ivan took off when you told him his parents are coming and this bitch freaks out. Fucking kicks me in the face, I think she broke my nose, man.
That’s not true! What the fuck is happening!!!!
What do you mean took off?
I was trying to stop Ivan from leaving and...
Trying? You just stop him from leaving. There’s no trying. What are you talking about?
I can’t touch the fucking guy. What are you talking about?
Why did you let him leave?
He told me not to touch the guy. And I was dealing with her.
He’s not answering. Let me think. Let me think.
If you mean Ivan’s wife? Yes! Tell him to let me go.
You tell me! Please, I’m not going to run. Tell him to let me go.
She’s a girl. What are you talking about?
Why is she tied? What is happening!
That’s what I want to know! What the fuck is happening!
I told you, I don’t know. Please untie me.
What, the two of you get beat up by a little girl?
Untie me now, motherfucker. This is so fucking illegal!
And c’mon. This is overkill. Untie her. Ridiculous.
I don't suggest that. Get what you need first. She’s not co-operative.
I’m leaving if you untie her!
I need you to call Ivan.
Untie me and I’ll call him.
Call him and get him back here and then you’ll be untied.
We have until noon tomorrow morning to find this little prick and get you two split.
Look. Your guy fucking attacked me. Both of them did. They forced their way in, fought with Ivan and then physically attacked me. What is going on?
I’m sorry it went down that way but it looks like they're the ones who were physically attacked. Now let’s call Ivan and tell him to get back here.
Great husband you have here. Ditches you and now doesn't answer your calls. Yeah, this marriage is real, my ass.
Look, I don’t know what kind of family drama is going on here but Ivan and I are married. It’s a real marriage and I’m not getting divorced.
The marriage isn’t real and we are getting it annulled and you have no say in it. So let bygones be bygones and let’s go find Ivan and get this fixed.
I’m his wife. I think I have a say in it.
Look. You two got married illegally. It’s a fraud marriage and we are getting it annulled right now.
We are two consenting adults who are legally married and there’s nothing you can do about it.
This is just Ivan playing around! Get over it!
No it's not, you have no idea.
Oh yeah, how long have you known Ivan? When did you meet?

No you don’t. He took you for a ride, lady. This is classic Ivan. Little bastard. I've been dealing with his shit since he was six- years-old. Now his parents are going to kill me and my fucking family will never speak to me again. This little prick!
I love my husband and I plan on being with him forever.
You are not in love and neither is he.
I can’t wait to have Ivan’s children. I’m probably already pregnant.
I hope you’re not because we’ll be taking care of that as well if you are.
Hey! Ivan doesn’t love you. He just hates his parents. Now let’s go find Ivan and get this taken care of.
Ha! He shamed his family, marrying somebody like you. And if you think for a minute this will be allowed to continue, you’re dead wrong.
The fuck we are. And I would like you to leave my home now. Or I’ll be pressing charges.
This isn't Ivan’s house. This is his father’s. You’re technically trespassing.
I’m married to Ivan and this is our home!

You married Ivan, not his father. Everything in here is Ivan’s father’s. The money belongs to his father. Ivan has nothing. The bedroom you two have been fucking in... that’s his parent’s room. His is down the hall... the one with the spaceships on the wall... cause he’s a fucking child!
Look, the son of Nikolai Zakharov is not marrying a whore.
Rich marry rich. That's the way it works. Not this. You help fix this or you’re going to be arrested.
Me arrested!? You should be fucking arrested!
Yes, you married Ivan to steal from his family.
You heard me. I think it’s pretty clear that Ivan was taken advantage of by a... scheming... prostitute... because of his family’s wealth.
And I’m sure you already have a criminal record so...
Fuck you. He proposed to me. He wanted to get married. Look, he bought me a 4 carat diamond wedding ring.
This is the property of the Zakharov’s.
What is she saying? Rape? What rape?
Shut up! Shut up! Shut her up.
She’s a biter. If you want her to shut up, you need to gag her.
We have to shut her up. The guard will hear!
Oh, don’t give me that shit. They’re landing at noon. You get us in front of the judge first thing or the family will be cutting ties with the firm tomorrow. Simple as that.
I'm sorry I had to do that but you gave me no choice.
Just do what they say. It’ll be so much easier.
We’ll see you at 9. Yeah, I have it. Yes. Ok.
Ok, time to break this broad.
Ok? Calm now? Going to behave?
Trust me. I know. I know what you’re thinking.
You’re thinking that this little shit betrayed you. I know how you feel because he’s betrayed me too.

He’s betrayed all of us. And most importantly, he betrayed his family by marrying you. He’s a spoiled brat who doesn’t want to grow up. And he pushed it too far this time. But I want to help you. The way I see it... this was a green card marriage and therefore Ivan owes you a green card marriage fee. That’s only fair. We get this annulled and I will see to it that you get a 10K fee, good?
No screaming ok? You scream and the gag goes back on.
10K. That’s as good as you’re going to get honey.
I want to talk to Ivan before agreeing to this.
We want to talk to Ivan too. So we want the same thing.
Ok, but look at me. When we find Ivan, which we will. And we get this marriage annulled, which we will. You walk away with 10K and never contact Ivan again. Yes?
Ok, untie her. The license and his passport.
Excuse me. I would like some privacy while I change.
I know. But I go by Ani, thank you!
Why is he getting back here with me? I don’t want this fucking psychopath back here with me.
Because I’m not sitting back there with you. You’re the fucking psychopath!
You have a big mess to clean in there.
Yeah and his friends own it or manage it or some shit.
I have to go to the hospital, man.
No, you don’t. You’re fine. We find Ivan and then... my wife will patch you up. She’s good at that.
I think I have a concussion, man.
Sorry for what happened back there. It didn’t have to be that difficult.
I don’t want him talking to me.
Swing by my place. I have something for him.
Hey guys. Have you guys seen Ivan?
And I asked you a question.
Look, Ivan’s in a lot of trouble. We need to find him. We need to know if you talked with him?
And I’ll ask you again... who the fuck are you?
Can you call Ivan for me?
And why can’t you call him?
Just... can you do me a favor and call him?
Actually I find this peculiar. Who are these guys and why are you asking other people to call your husband for you?
Crystal, we have a problem and I need to find Ivan.
Enough. One of you call Ivan, now.
This isn’t our business man. We haven’t seen him so...
If you aided him in this fraud of a marriage, then it is your business.
One of you better get Ivan on the line now.
What does ‘on the line’ mean, you old fuck.
One of you call Ivan now.
Give me your phone, you little fuck.
What are you planning to do with that?
I’m planning out beating your ass if you don’t get out now.
Call Ivan now or my friend here is going to practice his stroke on your fucking face.
I told you. I don’t know.
He can’t be with Aleks! Aleks is at work.
It’s faster if we walk. I’m not finding parking again.
You talk with him? You know where he is?
We have an emergency. We need to find Ivan.
Fuck. He knows we’re looking for him.
Can I have my phone back please.
He’s probably at home. I don’t fucking know.
He’s not there. And Tom and Crystal haven’t seen him.
Yeah well, I don’t know either so can you guys please... you going to cost me my job here.
I need a photo of Ivan.
C’mon, you must have a photo of the man you married.
You’re not taking my phone again.
I will fucking scream if you touch me.
I don’t have Instagram. I’m an adult.
If we looked at his fucking Instagram we would have known this shit two weeks ago.
I need everybody to take a look at this photo. We have a missing person and we need help now. Has anybody seen this kid?
Pfft. Not unless he’s in the Bahamas with her and her new fuck boy.

Yeah, she left my ass the minute we got back from Vegas. And you know why? ‘Cause she said I’d never propose to her the way Ivan proposed to you. Can you believe that shit? And the thing is... I would. I would have. I’m actually like a romantic, you know.
Ok, well, let’s go. No time to waste.
This is why we should have driven man. My fucking head is going to explode.
The cold is good for that, c’mon.
I’m not walking the whole way back. You can get the car and pick us up.
The hell I am. It’ll be dark soon. Move.
Here. This will help. You’ll get a nasty cold if you don’t cover your neck.
Why do you have that with you?
Why did you bring that with you?
In case you had to gag me again motherfucker?
Yeah, that’s what I thought. Fuck you, you piece of shit. Unfuckingbelievable.
Fuck it. Give it to me.
That’s my fucking car. No! Detach it now!
Can’t man. Policy. Once it’s attached, it’s coming with me.
Coming with you my ass. You’re not taking my car. Garnik! Igor! Help me. We’e fucked if he takes this. Garnik starts arguing with the driver as well.
This isn’t legal. You can’t do this!
I don’t think your boss understands the definition of legal.
Hey man. Don’t make me call the police.
They’ll tell you at the yard.
No, how much you want. Here. Here. Take it.
You asked for this! You’re not taking my car.
C’mon! Get in the fucking car! Get in!
Nothing is going to stop me! I’m going to find Ivan if it kills one of us.
We are going to find this fucker if it takes all fucking night.
This is real mink, isn’t it?
It’s fucking real, asshole. But it’s not mink. It’s fucking sable. Worth a lot more than mink. And don’t fucking touch it again.
What did you give him, goddamn it!
He vomited because he has a concussion, not because of Oxycodone.
Honestly... with how this day has been going... get the fuck outta here!
Clubs should be opening now. Which ones did you go to with him?
I don’t know. We hit a bunch.
See this guy? Has he been here tonight?
Yeah, he was here. We cut him off about an hour ago.
He’s doing a crawl. He’s on a bender.
I’m so fucked. I’m so fucked. We have six hours to find him and get to City Hall.
Ivan fucked me harder than he fucked you, trust me.
If we haven’t found him by now, we’re not finding him.
Did I ask you? Keep your opinions to yourself.
Give me one of those oxy’s.
Because I don’t have anymore plus I don’t deal drugs.
Yeah right, a gopnik who can afford to live at Brightwater and not deal drugs, ok?
I’m a gopnik? I’m living with my grandmother.
Why am I faggot ass bitch.
They say you’re born that way. I don’t know.
Your entire generation are entitled babies, you know that? It’s disgusting. Look at you. No respect for elders or authority. No ambition. No goals. Except to buy your new cool sneakers.
Ani’s fucking billionaire husband just strolled in and he’s looking for action.
And I’m going to give him some.
That marriage must be in the toilet already.
No work ethic. Lazy. Stupid. Arrogant. Uneducated. Tik Tok all day. Instagram. Spoiled. What is wrong with you? I’ve been working since 16-years-old.
Got ketchup on my fuckin’ sable.
Go. Go. Get in! Get in the fucking car!
Why don’t we go upstairs to a private room?
Don’t flip but he’s upstairs in a private with Diamond.
Look! Look at my face. This is your fault!
Ivan. Look at me. What’s going on?
Ivan. I’ve been calling and texting. Why didn’t you...Why didn’t you wait for me. I was coming but they forced me to stay. They tied me up and fucking gagged me.
It’s not a joke Vanya. They assaulted me and... we’ve been looking for you all night Vanya!
Please talk to them. They think we’re going to get divorced.
It’s not a divorce because it’s not a marriage, it’s an annulment.
Stop screaming. That’s fucking loud. Shit.
Tell them you don’t want this.
They’ll be here at noon. C’mon! We’re getting this annulled.
Wait. Shut up. I said I wanted to talk to him. Hold on! Ivan, what the fuck. We’re married. Let’s stay married. Ivan.
What do you want me to do? There’s nothing I can do.
What? What do you mean? I... I... I want to stay married to Ivan. Don’t you?
Do we have to talk about this now?
Yes! Ivan! Yes! Right now! This isn’t fair. He’s drunk. He doesn’t know what’s going on.
And we just dropped some molly.
Fuck off! Can you get her the fuck out of here...
Oh look at you? Looking for some company?
Ivan... please. Talk to me. Please.
C’mon. I can’t handle this right now.
